cases.title: Complete Smile Makeover
cases.description: Patient had chipped, discolored, and misaligned teeth. After a complete smile design with veneers and whitening, the transformation is remarkable.

cases.title: Dental Implant – Single Tooth
cases.description: Missing front tooth replaced with a titanium implant and zirconia crown — virtually indistinguishable from natural teeth. Full function restored.

cases.title: Braces & Alignment Correction
cases.description: Severe crowding and misalignment corrected over 18 months with precision braces. Perfect bite and confident smile achieved.
